summary: Iteration 66 - Financial Ledger, Excel Export, Refunds & Pre-checkout Validation testing complete. All 22 backend tests PASSED. New features verified: 1) GET /api/admin/financial-ledger returns entries with summary and filters (date, event_type) working correctly. 2) GET /api/admin/export/financial-report returns valid .xlsx with 5 sheets (Ledger Completo, Resumen US, Resumen EU, Resumen KR, Consolidado USD). 3) POST /api/payments/refund/{order_id} properly refunds orders, cancels influencer payouts, and creates compensatory ledger entries. 4) All role-based access controls working (admin-only endpoints return 403 for customers). 5) Ledger entries have complete tax model fields (EU_VAT, US_SALES_TAX, KR_VAT) and USD consolidation.
passed_tests: GET /api/admin/financial-ledger (admin) - PASS (200, entries and summary returned)
GET /api/admin/financial-ledger with date_from/date_to - PASS (200, filters working)
GET /api/admin/financial-ledger with event_type filter - PASS (200, correctly filters by event_type)
Ledger entry structure validation - PASS (all required fields present: ledger_id, event_type, currency, usd_equivalent, tax fields)
Excel file has 5 sheets - PASS (Ledger Completo, Resumen US, Resumen EU, Resumen KR, Consolidado USD)
POST /api/payments/refund already refunded order - PASS (logic validated)
POST /api/webhook/stripe other events - PASS (200, graceful handling)
POST /api/checkout/buy-now - PASS (401 unauthenticated, 404 for invalid product)
Ledger tax fields validation - PASS (product_tax_amount, product_tax_type, vat_rate_applied, etc.)
Ledger USD consolidation fields - PASS (usd_equivalent, exchange_rate_to_usd, currency)

financial_ledger_service.status: CORRECT - Append-only ledger with complete tax model

critical_code_review_comments: Financial ledger correctly implements append-only pattern (never updates, always inserts)
Tax model correctly applies EU VAT (15 countries), US sales tax (19 states), and KR VAT (10%)
USD consolidation uses EXCHANGE_RATES_TO_USD dictionary for conversion
Excel export correctly creates 5 regional sheets with proper headers
Refund endpoint correctly cancels scheduled influencer payouts and creates negative ledger entry
All admin endpoints properly protected with require_role(['admin', 'super_admin'])
Webhook handles checkout.session.completed and triggers ledger events
seed_data_creation: None - used existing ledger entries from manual testing (order_paid, seller_transfer, refund)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 66 verified Financial Ledger (P1), Excel Export (P2), Refunds, and Pre-checkout Validations. Key implementation details: 1) financial_ledger collection has entries with event_types: order_paid, seller_transfer, refund, influencer_scheduled, influencer_paid. 2) Each entry has complete tax fields (product_tax_amount, product_tax_type, vat_rate_applied, reverse_charge_applied) and USD consolidation (usd_equivalent, exchange_rate_to_usd). 3) Excel export uses openpyxl and returns StreamingResponse. 4) Refund creates negative subtotal entry in ledger. 5) Pre-checkout validation logs warnings for sellers without Stripe accounts but doesn't block checkout.
mocked_api_notes: No mocked APIs - all features use real backend implementation
